headline: Teradyne and Qualcomm have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: Teradyne and Qualcomm take center stage as AI-driven growth powers TER's surge, while QCOM faces pressure from declining handset sales.

headline: Bull of the Day: Teradyne (TER)
